title: Create conversationLearner.ts — the learning pipeline from conversation turns
completion_summary: Created ConversationLearner with learnFromTurn, detectUnknownWords, getAllKnownWords, getPendingSuggestions, confirmSuggestion, rejectSuggestion. Singleton exported. Integrates with LanguageMarkers dynamic API and LearningStore interface.

context_files.reason: Conversation learning enhancement requirements and pipeline design

acceptance_criteria: ConversationLearner class with learnFromTurn(input, output, mode) method
Detects unknown words (slang) not in any static marker list
Builds confidence-scored SuggestedLearning entries using output context
Feeds low-confidence suggestions into learningStore.suggestMemory for user review
TypeScript compiles without errors for conversationLearner.ts
No modification to learningStore.ts or languageMarkers.ts required (uses public API)
